# Books

Before I sleep I read a little. I do not really mind how many pages I get through. It is just that following the words in a quiet room helps my mind unwind.

On a night when I find a good book I stay up too late because I want to know what happens next. Even so, I think nights like that are not so bad.

When I finish a book I leave it on my desk for a while. Each time I see its spine, a little of how I felt while reading it comes back to me.
